name: Hidalgan Tlacoyos (Tlacoyos Hidalguenses)
recipeIngredient: 1 kg corn dough (masa de Maize), 2.2 lbs.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the peas and mash them thoroughly.
2. Mix the corn dough and lard together until well combined.
3. Form thick tortillas (about 1/4 inch thick) and stretch them into an ovoid shape.
4. Fill each tortilla with peas, then fry on a comal (a dry iron frying pan may be substituted) to form tlacoyos.
5. Peel the tomatoes and blend them with a little serrano chili, water, and salt until well mixed.
6. Fry the tomato mixture until the flavor peaks.
7. Pour the sauce over the tlacoyos.
